title: Italian Style Stuffed Tomatoes
description: Delicious Italian dish featuring tomatoes stuffed with a flavorful mixture of ingredients. This recipe is perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: 2. Cut the tops off the tomatoes and scoop out the insides, being careful not to puncture the sides.
3. In a bowl, combine the algerian, sour, and snappy.
4. Stuff each tomato with the mixture, filling to the top.
5. Place the stuffed tomatoes in a baking dish and cover with foil.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the tomatoes are tender.
7. Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the tops are lightly browned.
8. Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
